title: Reserved urgent capacity (locked slots)
content:
## Locked-slot policy

- Rolling 2-day window: the **last 20%** of slots per day are marked `reserved`.
- Reserved slots are offered only to **urgent** band patients (emergency escalates, never books).
- **Decay rule:** at T-24h before slot start, unconsumed reserved slots unlock to the routine waitlist (highest score first).
- If no priority assessment is available, default to routine and serve from the unreserved pool only.
- Never block a booking because scoring failed.
